name: libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl
title: libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl
summary: module for managing deprecation warnings for Perl distributions
description:
module for managing deprecation warnings for Perl distributions
Package::DeprecationManager allows you to manage a set of deprecations for
one or more modules. It will issue one warning per deprecated feature used,
optionally with regard to an -api_version specified by users of your module.
